name: fidelity-studio-content-assistant
description: Draft newsletters and manage blog posts and team members through Fidelity Studio's scoped content tools and Resend's hosted newsletter tools.

interface.shortDescription: Manage newsletters, blog posts, and team profiles.
interface.longDescription: Connects Fidelity Studio's authenticated website-content MCP and Resend's hosted newsletter MCP. The bundled skill loads scoped client guidance first, keeps newsletters draft-and-test-only, and requires explicit approval before publishing website content. Production newsletter delivery stays manual in Resend.
defaultPrompt: Authenticate with Fidelity Studio Content Assistant.
Show me my authenticated project context and available workflows.
Help me draft a newsletter, blog post, or team-member update.
